---
title: "APGAP Influenza Pipeline"

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
    css: run_summary.css

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(htmltools)
library(knitr)
library(gt)


summary <- read_tsv(
    "run_summary.tsv",
    show_col_types = FALSE
)

review <- read_tsv(
    "tables/samples_requiring_review.tsv",
    show_col_types = FALSE
)
```

<div class="title-banner">

# APGAP Influenza Pipeline

## Run Summary Report

Influenza Whole-Genome Sequencing

Arizona State University

</div>

## Overview

```{r}
div(
  class = "dashboard",

  div(
    class = "value-box complete",
    h2(nrow(summary)),
    p("Samples")
  ),

  div(
    class = "value-box complete",
    h2(sum(summary$pass_segments == 8)),
    p("Complete")
  ),

  div(
    class = "value-box nearcomplete",
    h2(sum(summary$pass_segments >= 6 &
           summary$pass_segments < 8)),
    p("Near-complete")
  ),

  div(
    class = "value-box partial",
    h2(sum(summary$pass_segments >= 1 &
           summary$pass_segments < 6)),
    p("Partial")
  ),

  div(
    class = "value-box failed",
    h2(sum(summary$pass_segments == 0)),
    p("Failed")
  ),

  div(
    class = "value-box review",
    h2(sum(summary$review_required)),
    p("Review")
  )

)
```

```{r}
metadata <- tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Run date",
    "Host",
    "Pipeline version"
  ),
  Value = c(
    format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
    unique(summary$host),
    "0.1.0"
  )
)
```

# ⚠ Samples Requiring Immediate Review

```{r}
n_review <- nrow(review)

if (n_review == 0) {

  div(
    class = "alert alert-success",
    h4("✓ No samples require manual review."),
    p("All samples passed the configured QC thresholds.")
  )

} else {

review |>
  select(
    sample_id,
    host,
    potential_subtype,
    genome_status,
    review_reason
  ) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "⚠ Samples Requiring Manual Review"
  )

}
```

# Sample Summary

```{r}
sample_table <-
  summary %>%
  mutate(
    QC = genome_status,

    Review = if_else(
      review_required,
      "⚠ Review",
      "✓ OK"
    ),

    Report = sprintf(
      "[📄 Report](../summary/%s.sample_summary.html)",
      sample_id
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    sample_id,
    QC,
    Review,
    host,
    potential_subtype,
    ha_call,
    na_call,
    pass_segments,
    subtype_min_median_depth,
    aa_changes,
    synonymous_changes,
    nonsynonymous_changes,
    Report
  )

sample_table |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Sample Summary"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    sample_id = "Sample",
    QC = "QC Status",
    Review = "Review",
    host = "Host",
    potential_subtype = "Predicted Subtype",
    ha_call = "HA",
    na_call = "NA",
    pass_segments = "Passing Segments",
    subtype_min_median_depth = "Min Median Depth",
    aa_changes = "AA Changes",
    synonymous_changes = "Synonymous",
    nonsynonymous_changes = "Nonsynonymous",
    Report = "Sample Report"
  ) |>
  fmt_markdown(
    columns = Report
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.width = pct(100),
    table.font.size = px(13),
    heading.background.color = "#8C1D40",
    heading.title.font.size = px(18)
  )
```

# Genome Completeness

```{r}

asu_palette <- c(
  Complete="#8C1D40",
  "Near-complete"="#A95670FF",
  Partial="#C58E9FFF",
  Failed="#DFC9CFFF"
)

genome_status <-
  summary %>%
  count(genome_status) %>%
  mutate(
    genome_status = factor(
      genome_status,
      levels = c(
        "Complete",
        "Near-complete",
        "Partial",
        "Failed"
      )
    )
  )

p <- ggplot(
  genome_status,
  aes(
    genome_status,
    n,
    fill = genome_status
  )
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = asu_palette) +
  labs(
    x = "Genome Status",
    y = "Samples"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none"
  )
p
```

# HA Subtype Distribution

```{r}
ha_counts <- summary %>%
    count(ha_call)

p <- ggplot(
  ha_counts,
  aes(
    x = reorder(ha_call, n),
    y = n
  )
) +
  geom_col(
    fill = "#8C1D40",
    width = 0.7
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = "HA Subtype",
    y = "Samples"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p
```

# NA Subtype Distribution

```{r}
na_counts <- summary %>%
    count(na_call)

p <- ggplot(
  na_counts,
  aes(
    x = reorder(na_call, n),
    y = n
  )
) +
  geom_col(
    fill = "#FFC627",
    width = 0.7
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = "NA Subtype",
    y = "Samples"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p
```

# Host Distribution

```{r}
host_counts <-
  summary %>%
  count(host)

p <- ggplot(
  host_counts,
  aes(
    reorder(host, n),
    n
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = "Host",
    y = "Samples"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p
```

# Average Coverage

```{r}
p <- ggplot(
  summary,
  aes(subtype_min_median_depth)
) +
 geom_histogram(
  bins = 30,
  fill = "#8C1D40",
  color = "white"
) +
  labs(
    x = "Mean depth",
    y = "Samples"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p
```

# Sequencing Depth Distribution

```{r}
p <- ggplot(
  summary,
  aes(pass_segments)
) +
  geom_histogram(
  binwidth = 1,
  fill = "#FFC627",
  color = "white"
) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:8) +
  labs(
    x = "Passing genome segments",
    y = "Samples"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p
```

# Publication-quality Summary Figure

::: {.center-figure}

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("figures/run_summary.png")
```

:::
```
